keywords.serpWeakness: Top tools are generic aggregators (HomeAdvisor, RemodelingCalculator) that require personal info; no instant, anonymous result.
userComplaints: Ask for email and phone before showing results
Estimates too broad and not localized

keywords.serpWeakness: Many results are static blog posts with average ranges, not interactive calculators that let you choose materials.
userComplaints: Can't select appliance grade
Data feels like it's from 2021

keywords.keyword: bathroom remodel cost estimate by zip code
keywords.serpWeakness: Very few tools actually integrate zip-code-specific labor rates; most give a single national average.
userComplaints: No real location factor
Estimates don't account for urban vs. rural labor

keywords.keyword: how much does a whole house remodel cost
keywords.serpWeakness: Results are listicles or general guides with huge cost ranges, lacking interactive square footage inputs.
userComplaints: Too vague—$50k–$200k isn't helpful
No option to break down per room

keywords.keyword: home addition cost per square foot calculator
keywords.serpWeakness: Most calculators are basic, missing foundation type, second-story addition, or finish level options.
userComplaints: Can't choose between slab, crawlspace, or basement
No option for high-end finishes

keywords.serpWeakness: Top downloads are generic budget sheets from 2019, not renovation-specific with line items and formulas.
userComplaints: Templates are too simple, not customizable
No pre-filled cost categories

keywords.serpWeakness: No major tool offers an email-free, instant estimate with full detail; mostly gated content.
userComplaints: Immediate popup demanding email
Results hidden behind a lead-gen form

keywords.serpWeakness: App store listings dominate; web-based options are underwhelming and often non-interactive.

Web tools are not mobile responsive

keywords.keyword: interior renovation cost breakdown room by room
keywords.serpWeakness: Results are text-based articles, not an interactive room-by-room selector with real-time total calculation.
userComplaints: Can't add custom rooms

keywords.keyword: diy vs contractor renovation cost comparison
keywords.serpWeakness: Few tools compare side-by-side with labor vs. material costs per project type; mostly static blog opinions.
userComplaints: No slider to adjust labor rates
Can't see cost difference by skill level

keywords.serpWeakness: Similar to other room calculators—static averages, no moisture/foundation condition factor, no local labor.

keywords.keyword: renovation cost estimator with sliders for quality
